RepeatEntity.description:
A definition of RepeatEntity for the type checker

This is not really used - instead the dynamic class is created
by the make_entity_model function is used.

entity_enabled.description: enable or disable this entity instance

values.title: Values

Wait4IPEntity.description:
A definition of Wait4IPEntity for the type checker.

This is not really used - instead the dynamic class is created
by the make_entity_models function is used.

entity_enabled.description: enable or disable this entity instance
entity_enabled.title: Entity Enabled

device.description: The device name to use in the database record.
device.title: Device

timeout.description:
The number of seconds to wait for a response before considering the communication attempt a failure and exiting the IOC startup process; this will trigger a restart of the IOC pod by Kubernetes.
A value of 0 means to wait indefinitely until communication is established.
timeout.title: Timeout

address.description: The IP address and port to check communication with.
address.title: Address

Wait4IPEntity.title: Wait4IPEntity

device.description: The device name to use in the database record.

timeout.description:
The number of seconds to wait for a response before considering the communication attempt a failure and exiting the IOC startup process; this will trigger a restart of the IOC pod by Kubernetes.
A value of 0 means to wait indefinitely until communication is established.
timeout.title: Timeout

id.description: The ID of the USB device to wait for.This should be in the format 'vendor_id:product_id', where vendor_id and product_id are the hexadecimal IDs of the USB device.For example, '1234:5678'.
id.title: Id
